summary:
No, FTY720 has not been considered for stroke treatment; instead, it is contraindicated in patients with prior strokes due to heightened cardiovascular risks. Current medical guidelines exclude it entirely based on safety concerns rather than any therapeutic benefit observed in stroke populations.
